vllm.title: Use FP32 in RoPE initialization
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #883
This PR uses FP32 for initializing the cos and sin cache in RoPE. This resolves the precision issues when using a large base like 1000000 with FP16.
NOTE: This change is aligned with the RoPE definition in HuggingFace. However, as mentioned in #863, this may not align with the original de

vllm.title: Bump up the version to v0.1.7
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Now that we fixed critical issues on ALiBi, Falcon, and Code Llama, we should bump up the version and make a new release.
